title: Running Python Scripts Cheat Sheet
printNote: Quick reference for Running Python Scripts in Python.

entries.syntax: # Python implementation for Running Python Scripts
entries.example:
# Python implementation for Running Python Scripts
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
entries.description: Basic syntax for Running Python Scripts
